name: io.github.insideos-designs/cowork-qa
description: Goal-driven Playwright browser sessions for LLMs, with full action traces and aria-snapshots.

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to launch Chromium with a visible window instead of headless.
environmentVariables.name: COWORK_QA_HEADED

environmentVariables.description: Directory where session traces (<session-id>.json) are written. Defaults to <cwd>/.cowork-qa.
environmentVariables.name: COWORK_QA_DATA
